passage_text: The attorney general has exclusive authority to enforce this article. A violation of this article constitutes a deceptive trade practice under section 6-1-105 of the Colorado Consumer Protection Act. There is no private right of action under this article.

enforcement.penalty_description: A violation constitutes a deceptive trade practice under section 6-1-105 of the Colorado Consumer Protection Act
